races.name: Human
races.description: Adaptable and ambitious, humans are the most common folk in the realm. Their short lives burn bright with determination.
races.flavorText: What we lack in time, we make up in will.

races.name: Half-Elf
races.description: Born between worlds, half-elves inherit elven grace and human drive. They often feel like outsiders in both societies.

races.name: Half-Orc
races.description: Bearing orcish strength tempered by human cunning, half-orcs are formidable warriors who must constantly prove themselves.
races.flavorText: Strength is not given. It is taken.

races.name: Tiefling
races.description: Descended from infernal bloodlines, tieflings bear the mark of their heritage. Mistrusted by many, they often walk a difficult path.
races.flavorText: My blood does not define my destiny.
